audit_items.proof_trace: Every free in hyperloglog.c is safe: in hllSparseToDense, all reads from the old sparse sds (via local pointers sparse/p/end/oldhdr) complete before sdsfree(o->ptr) at L633, and the error-path sdsfree(dense) at L628 has no subsequent use. In hllSparseSet, local pointers to o->ptr are not referenced at the promote: label after hllSparseToDense resets o->ptr. All callers (pfaddCommand L1203, pfmergeCommand L1359+L1365, pfdebugCommand L1514) consistently re-read hdr = o->ptr after any call that may trigger promotion, ensuring no stale pointer dereference.
